title: Add focused digital Commons proof
goal: Implement a first digital Commons view where exactly one hierarchy branch is focused at a time.

acceptance.assertion: Only one digital Commons branch is active at a time.
Breadcrumb/back navigation makes the focus path explicit.
The proof does not introduce an unrestricted network graph.

metadata.source_pr_task_marker_note: Commonworld PR #7 body says T006, but its title, files and acceptance content implement the focused digital Commons/Aether proof now represented by COMMONWORLD-ATLAS-V1-T004. Later Bureau T006 was the map-smoke follow-up and is already separately verified.

validated_acceptance.single-branch: PR #7 adds a focused Aether proof where the active branch region and validator enforce one active Aether Commons project at a time.
validated_acceptance.breadcrumb: PR #7 adds a data-breadcrumb proof navigation surface and active branch region; validate_aether_proof.py checks the breadcrumb and focus hooks.
validated_acceptance.no-hairball: PR #7 Aether README and validator require no force-directed hairball network and no MapLibre dependency; the proof uses focused branches instead of an unrestricted graph.

validation: PR #7 body records validate_aether_proof.py and unittest suite.
Current Commonworld main still includes validate_aether_proof.py, tests/test_aether_proof.py, and make validate coverage.
